---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What operational scenario isn't well served today? Be concrete.

## Proposal

Sketch the change. Affected modules, capabilities, events.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches were on the table?

## Architectural impact

- [ ] Touches a frozen surface (manifest, event envelope, permission naming) — requires ADR.
- [ ] Adds a new module.
- [ ] Adds a new top-level package.
- [ ] Affects an existing module's API.
- [ ] None of the above (module-internal).

If any boxes above are checked, draft the ADR alongside the proposal.

## Additional context

Anything else worth knowing.
